title: Speaker-Disentangled Chunk-Wise Regression for Syllabic Tokenization
innovation_summary: Speaker-Disentangled Chunk-Wise Regression for Syllabic Tokenization: To address this problem, we propose a speaker-disentangled syllabic tokenizer that regresses speaker-perturbed student representations toward clean teacher targets within fixed-length chunks.
